hydration.name: Drink 2 Liters of Water
hydration.description: Stay hydrated throughout the day. Carry a water bottle.
hydration.benefits: Improves digestion, energy levels, skin health, and helps in weight management

hydration.name: Drink Warm Water in the Morning
hydration.description: Start your day with a glass of warm water. Add lemon if preferred.
hydration.benefits: Aids digestion, kickstarts metabolism, flushes toxins

hydration.name: Switch One Cup of Chai to Herbal Tea
hydration.description: Replace one regular chai with tulsi tea, ginger tea, or green tea.
hydration.benefits: Reduces caffeine intake, anti-inflammatory properties, calming effect

movement.name: 10-Minute Walk After Dinner
movement.description: Take a light walk after your evening meal. Helps digestion and reduces blood sugar spikes.
movement.benefits: Better digestion, improved blood sugar control, aids weight loss

movement.name: Stretch at Your Desk
movement.description: Every hour, stand up and do 5 minutes of stretching. Neck rolls, shoulder shrugs, wrist circles.
movement.benefits: Reduces stiffness, improves posture, prevents back pain

movement.name: 5-Minute Morning Stretch
movement.description: Start your day with simple stretches - neck, shoulders, arms, spine, legs.
movement.benefits: Wakes up muscles, improves flexibility, sets a positive tone for the day

movement.name: Take Stairs Instead of Lift
movement.description: Whenever possible, choose stairs over elevators and escalators.
movement.benefits: Builds leg strength, improves cardiovascular health, burns extra calories

movement.name: Stand for 10 Minutes After Meals
movement.description: Avoid sitting immediately after eating. Stand or walk gently for 10 minutes.
movement.benefits: Improves digestion, reduces bloating, helps maintain healthy weight

mindfulness.name: Gratitude Journaling
mindfulness.description: Write down 3 things you're grateful for each day. Keep it simple and specific.
mindfulness.benefits: Improves mental health, reduces stress, increases positivity

mindfulness.name: 2-Minute Deep Breathing
mindfulness.description: Practice 4-7-8 breathing: Inhale 4 seconds, hold 7 seconds, exhale 8 seconds.
mindfulness.benefits: Reduces anxiety, lowers blood pressure, calms the nervous system

mindfulness.name: No Phone for First 30 Minutes
mindfulness.description: Don't check your phone for the first 30 minutes after waking up.
mindfulness.benefits: Reduces morning anxiety, improves focus, better mental clarity

mindfulness.name: No Phone 30 Minutes Before Bed
mindfulness.description: Put your phone away at least 30 minutes before bedtime. Read a book instead.
mindfulness.benefits: Better sleep quality, reduced blue light exposure, improves melatonin production

mindfulness.name: 5-Minute Meditation
mindfulness.description: Sit comfortably, close your eyes, focus on your breath. When mind wanders, gently return.
mindfulness.benefits: Reduces stress, improves concentration, promotes emotional balance

mindfulness.name: Evening Reflection
mindfulness.description: Before bed, think about 3 good things that happened today and 1 thing to improve tomorrow.
mindfulness.benefits: Promotes self-awareness, improves sleep, reinforces positive thinking

nutrition.name: Add One Serving of Green Vegetables
nutrition.description: Include one extra serving of leafy greens like spinach, methi, or palak in any meal.
nutrition.benefits: Increases fiber, vitamins, and minerals; aids weight management

nutrition.name: Skip One Fried Snack
nutrition.description: Replace one fried snack (samosa, vada, pakora) with a healthier option like fruit or roasted chana.
nutrition.benefits: Reduces calorie intake, lowers unhealthy fat consumption

nutrition.name: Mindful Eating for One Meal
nutrition.description: Eat one meal without screens. Chew slowly, taste each bite, stop when satisfied.
nutrition.benefits: Better digestion, prevents overeating, improves relationship with food

nutrition.name: Add Protein to Breakfast
nutrition.description: Include protein at breakfast - eggs, paneer, dal, or yogurt instead of just carbs.
nutrition.benefits: Keeps you fuller longer, supports muscle building, stabilizes blood sugar

nutrition.name: Pre-Portion Your Meals
nutrition.description: Serve food in a bowl/plate instead of eating from the container. Avoid second helpings.
nutrition.benefits: Controls portions naturally, reduces calorie intake without feeling deprived

sleep.name: Same Bedtime (Within 30 Minutes)
sleep.description: Go to bed at the same time every night, even on weekends. Aim for 7-8 hours.
sleep.benefits: Regulates body clock, improves sleep quality, better energy levels

sleep.name: Be in Bed by 10:30 PM
sleep.description: Aim to be in bed by 10:30 PM to ensure quality sleep before 11 PM when melatonin peaks.
sleep.benefits: Better sleep quality, aligns with natural circadian rhythm

sleep.name: 20-Minute Wind-Down Routine
sleep.description: Before bed: dim lights, read a book, do light stretching or listen to calming music.
sleep.benefits: Signals body it's time to sleep, reduces cortisol, improves sleep onset

digital_wellness.name: Reduce Screen Time by 30 Minutes
digital_wellness.description: Set a screen time limit. Use that extra 30 minutes for a walk, reading, or family time.
digital_wellness.benefits: Reduces eye strain, improves mental health, more time for real connections

digital_wellness.name: One Hour Social Media Break
digital_wellness.description: Take a break from Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp for one hour. Read or take a walk instead.
digital_wellness.benefits: Reduces anxiety, improves focus, better mental health

digital_wellness.name: Phone Away During Meals
digital_wellness.description: Keep your phone in another room during breakfast, lunch, and dinner.
digital_wellness.benefits: Mindful eating, better digestion, family bonding time

productivity.name: Complete Morning Routine Before 9 AM
productivity.description: Finish bathing, breakfast, and planning before 9 AM. Start your day with intention.
productivity.benefits: Sets positive tone, reduces rushing, improves time management

productivity.name: Set 3 Priorities for Tomorrow
productivity.description: Before bed, write down 3 most important tasks for the next day.
productivity.benefits: Clear focus, better time management, sense of accomplishment

productivity.name: Pomodoro Technique at Work
productivity.description: Work for 25 minutes, then take a 5-minute break. After 4 cycles, take a longer break.
productivity.benefits: Maintains focus, prevents burnout, improves productivity

social_connection.name: Eat One Meal with Family
social_connection.description: Have at least one meal per day with your family without screens.
social_connection.benefits: Strengthens bonds, mindful eating, emotional well-being

social_connection.name: Call a Family Member or Friend
social_connection.description: Make time to call a loved one. A 10-minute conversation can boost your mood.
social_connection.benefits: Reduces loneliness, improves mood, maintains relationships

social_connection.name: One Social Activity Per Week
social_connection.description: Meet a friend, join a club, or participate in a community activity once a week.
social_connection.benefits: Builds community, prevents isolation, adds joy to life

nature_outdoors.name: Get 10 Minutes of Morning Sunlight
nature_outdoors.description: Step outside within 30 minutes of waking to get natural sunlight. Good for vitamin D and circadian rhythm.
nature_outdoors.benefits: Vitamin D synthesis, better sleep, improved mood

nature_outdoors.name: One Hour in Nature Weekly
nature_outdoors.description: Visit a park, garden, or any green space for at least one hour per week.
nature_outdoors.benefits: Reduces stress, improves mental health, boosts immunity

nature_outdoors.name: Tend to Indoor Plants
nature_outdoors.description: Water and care for indoor plants. Green spaces improve air quality and mood.
nature_outdoors.benefits: Improves air quality, reduces stress, adds life to living space
